name: Maximilian
description: Imperial and noble, a classic German name bearing a sense of grandeur.

name: Emma
description: Timeless and beloved; a name that consistently tops the charts in Germany.

name: Felix
description: A cheerful and lucky name, from the Latin for 'blessed with success'.

name: Hanna
description: Simple and elegant, short for Johanna, a woman of quiet charm.

name: Leon
description: Short, strong, and popular; a symbol of bravery and power.

name: Mia
description: A short, sweet, and internationally loved name of Scandinavian origin.

name: Elias
description: Greek form of Elijah; a strong and popular biblical name.

name: Emilia
description: A rival in a good sense; a romantic and very popular name in Germany.

name: Ben
description: Short for Benjamin; friendly, modern, and highly favored.

name: Lina
description: Soft and gentle, a popular standalone name of Arabic origin.

name: Noah
description: The ark builder; a top favorite in Germany, symbolizing peace.

name: Marie
description: Timeless and classic, often used in compound names like Annemarie.

name: Paul
description: A short, apostolic name that is sturdy, classic, and beloved.

name: Sophia
description: Intelligent and graceful; a name of Greek origin that exudes elegance.

name: Jonas
description: Biblical prophet swallowed by a whale; a symbol of peace.

name: Anna
description: A simple and elegant biblical classic, never goes out of style.

name: Lukas
description: Bringer of light; the German spelling is a modern favorite.

name: Laura
description: Symbol of victory and honor; Petrarch's beloved muse.

name: Finn
description: Nordic hero name; adventurous, short, and cool.

name: Lea
description: Biblical Leah; a gentle and very popular name in Germany.

name: Henry
description: A royal German name adapted into English, now back in Germany.

name: Clara
description: Luminous and pure; a vintage name that is shining again.

name: Moritz
description: A classic German boy name; St. Maurice, a soldier saint.

name: Johanna
description: Feminine of Johann; a strong, classic, and pious name.

name: Oskar
description: Old Norse/Germanic roots; a name for a writer or a warrior.

name: Mathilda
description: Vintage and strong; a warrior princess of ancient Germany.

name: Anton

name: Frieda
description: An old German name; peace and tranquility combined with strength.

name: Jakob
description: Old Testament patriarch; solid and traditional.

name: Greta
description: Diminutive of Margarete; a pearl of great value.

name: David
description: King of Israel; a universally loved name.

name: Lotte
description: Short for Charlotte; sweet, simple, and charming.

name: Philipp
description: A noble and classic name, fit for a prince.

name: Ida
description: Short and sweet; a vintage name returning to favor.

name: Niklas

name: Luisa

name: Julian
description: Roman clan name; timeless, handsome, and noble.

name: Theresa
description: Saint Teresa; a warm, maternal, and spiritual name.

name: Jannik

name: Nora
description: Short for Honora or Eleanor; bright and honest.

name: Till
description: Short for Dietrich; a folk hero trickster, clever and cool.

name: Jule
description: Short for Julia or Juliane; young and fresh.

name: Tim
description: Short for Timothy; a faithful and friendly companion.

name: Lara
description: Short and international; a protective and bright force.

name: Kilian
description: Irish saint name; very popular in Bavaria, a devout warrior.

name: Ronja

description: Roman clan name; a sociable and well-liked person.

name: Paulina

name: Linus
description: Mythological musician and a pope; a gentle artist.

name: Amelie
description: French origin but very popular in Germany; hardworking charm.

name: Matthias
description: Apostle chosen by lot; a solid and faithful gift.

name: Sarah
description: Biblical matriarch; noble and graceful across cultures.

name: Milan
description: Slavic origin, trendy in Germany; a cosmopolitan name.

name: Victoria
description: Roman goddess of triumph; a powerful and successful woman.

name: Fiete
description: North German short form of Friedrich; a sailor's name.

name: Elisabeth
description: Regal and timeless; a classic name of queens and saints.

name: Nils
description: Scandinavian-German; a winner, known from the story of Nils Holgersson.

name: Leni

name: Hannes
description: Short for Johannes; down-to-earth and reliable.

name: Marlene

name: Theo
description: Short for Theodore; a trendy, divine gift.

name: Nele
description: A Frisian name; simple, modern, and rural charm.

name: Jan

name: Jana

description: Saint of firefighters; a blossoming and brave hero.

name: Pia
description: Short and sweet; a woman of faith and duty.

name: Charlotte

name: Caroline

description: A classic radiant beauty; full of light and grace.

description: The crowned one; a steadfast and loyal companion.

description: The old German hero; a strong leader of the folk.

description: Celtic goddess name; a strong and luminous woman.

description: A folk defender; a loyal and watchful protector.

name: Gabi
description: Short for Gabriele; a friendly, strong-willed woman.

name: Rüdiger

description: Norse god of peace; a simple, vintage, and safe name.

description: A classic German name; prosperous and wealthy.

description: Frisian short form of Cecilia; a delicate and artistic name.

description: Old Norse origin; a warrior from the island.
